item.title: DEBT: Split TextViewCoordinator into focused responsibility files
item.intent: A 1,666-line coordinator is a maintenance hazard — adding any feature risks side effects across unrelated concerns
item.description: TextViewCoordinator handles UITextViewDelegate/NSTextViewDelegate, formatting engine orchestration, rendering pipeline (parse/debounce/apply), find/replace highlighting, interactive elements (checkboxes, links), cursor mapping, doctor coordination, ghost text coordination, and performance instrumentation. Extract orthogonal concerns into: TextViewKeyCommandHandler (keyboard shortcuts), TextViewRenderingCoordinator (parse/render/debounce logic), FindReplaceCoordinator (find/replace highlighting). Keep core delegate work in a slimmed TextViewCoordinator.
acceptanceCriteria: All existing editor behavior works identically after the split
No new public API surface — internal decomposition only
